title: SEM Critical Point Dryer JIAM Protocol
steps: Power on the machine at least 5 minutes before using (Suggest doing this during the last dehydration step).
Make sure the O-ring between the cover (with 3 screws) and the chamber is in good shape.
Close cover and tighten screws.
Open the small vent rate knob all the way – will take some time to close.
The system cools down. Fill with liquid CO 2 by opening the Vent knob, Fill knob, Drain Knob, and opening the CO 2 tank. This lets liquid CO 2 enter the chamber, but evacuate.
After a minute or so of this, close the CO 2 valve and drain valve – make sure the pressure gauge is zero
Open chamber partway and shake lid to make sure pressure is gone. Then put samples onto the sled with the post side entering the chamber first – Be super quick.
Replace cover and tighten screws evenly.
Begin by opening the CO 2 tank (Vent and Fill should be open still).
After the chamber fills, closeVent the close Fill (leave the CO 2 tank open).
Let sit for 10 minutes.
To cycle the CO 2 in the chamber after 10 minutes, close the CO 2 tank, open the Fill, Vent, and Drain.
Once the liquid is evacuated, close the Drain.
Then open the CO 2 tank – let the chamber fill back up.
Once, full, close Vent, and Fill.
Let sit for 10 minutes.
To cycle the CO 2 in the chamber after the second 10 minutes, close the CO 2 tank, open the Fill, Vent, and Drain.
Once the liquid is evacuated, close Drain
Then open the CO 2 tank – let the chamber fill back up.
Once, full, close Vent and Fill.
At this point, you can begin Heating.
Close the Vent Rate valve. Small knob.
WATCH THE PRESSURE GAUGE – should never go above 1400 psi. You can modulate pressure by opening the VENT valve and then incrementally opening the small vent rate knob.
Heat turns off automatically once the chamber reaches 42 o C, which takes about 12 minutes.
At this point, bleed off the pressure slowly until the gauge reads zero pressure.
creator: Eadewunm
